faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth problem in my Massapequa Park home?
faqs.answer: Signs include irregular holes in wool clothing, cashmere, or upholstery; silky webbing in closet corners; small cream-colored larvae; and adult moths (about 1/2 inch) flying near wardrobes. You may also notice damaged furs, felt, or carpet edges, particularly in quiet storage areas.
